verdict.summary: Service server is not running or registered under a different name. wait_for_service() times out.

dead_ends.action: Increase the timeout to very large values
dead_ends.why_fails: If the server is not running at all, no amount of waiting will help; masks the real problem

dead_ends.action: Call the service without waiting, catching exceptions
dead_ends.why_fails: The call itself will fail with a cryptic error; try/except hides configuration bugs

dead_ends.action: Use topics instead of services for request/reply
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses the synchronous call guarantee and requires manual correlation of responses

workarounds.action: Verify the service server node is running and the name matches exactly
Check namespace: service name may be under a namespace prefix
Use wait_for_service with a reasonable timeout and informative error
workarounds.how: if not client.wait_for_service(timeout_sec=5.0): raise RuntimeError('Service not found')

preceded_by.condition: Server node package not built or sourced
